title: A method and device for generating deformation twinning in a metal
abstract: The present disclosure relates to: a method of generating twin lamellas in a metal body (1), comprising the steps of: - introducing said metal body (1) into a chamber (2); - filling said chamber (2) with a cooling medium having a temperature that will enable generation of twin lamellas in the metal body (1) upon deformation thereof; and - deforming said metal body (1) while the latter is surrounded by said cooling medium; wherein the cooling medium surrounding said metal body (1) upon deformation of the latter is in a gaseous state. The present disclosure also relates to: a device for generating twin lamellas in a metal body (1), said device comprising: - a chamber (2); - a chamber (2) inlet connected to a cooling medium source (4); and - a deformation device (5) for deforming said metal body (1); said deformation device (5) being positioned inside said chamber (2); wherein the deformation device (5) is positioned so that the metal body (1) will be surrounded by said cooling medium in a gaseous state while being deformed by said deformation device (5).
claims:
Claims PATENT CLAIMS 1. A method of generating twin lamellas in a metal body (1), comprising the steps of - introducing said metal body (1) into a chamber (2); - filling said chamber (2) with a cooling medium having a temperature that will enable generation of twin lamellas in the metal body (1) upon deformation thereof; and - deforming said metal body (1) while the latter is surrounded by said cooling medium; wherein the cooling medium surrounding said metal body (1) upon deformation of the latter is in a gaseous state. 2. The method according to claim 1, wherein the temperature inside the chamber (2) is controlled by means of controlled introduction of said cooling medium into the chamber (2) on at least two different locations within the chamber (2), wherein the cooling medium is on a first location directed directly onto the metal body (1) being deformed, and on a second location directed onto a deformation device (5) used to deform said metal body (1). 3. The method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein in the cooling medium has a temperature in the range of about -80Â°C to about -195Â°C. 4. The method according to any one of claims 1-3, wherein said cooling medium consists essentially of nitrogen. 5. The method according to any one of claims 1-4, wherein said cooling medium is introduced in a liquid state into the chamber (2) and is permitted to change to a gaseous state once introduced into said chamber (2). 6. The method according to any one of claims 1-5, wherein said metal body (1) is an elongated body which is continuously introduced into said chamber (2) through an opening in the latter, and wherein the cooling medium in a gaseous state is taken 

 from the chamber (2) and used for pre-cooling of parts of said metal body (1) that have yet not been introduced into the chamber (2). 7. The method according to any one of claims 1-6, wherein said metal body (1) is a wire or tube and wherein said deformation of said metal body (1) inside said chamber (2) includes a reduction of the thickness thereof. 8. A device for generating twin lamellas in a metal body (1), said device comprising -a chamber (2); -a chamber inlet (3) connected to a cooling medium source (4); and -a deformation device (5) for deforming said metal body (1), said deformation device (5) being positioned inside said chamber (2); wherein the deformation device (5) is positioned so that the metal body (1) will be surrounded by said cooling medium in a gaseous state while being deformed by said deformation device (5). 9. The device according to claim 8, further comprising temperature control means (6) for controlling the temperature inside said chamber (2) by controlling the introduction of cooling medium into the chamber (2). 10. The device according to claim 9, wherein said temperature control means comprises at least a first and a second independently controllable nozzle (45, 46) positioned inside the chamber (2) and configured to introduce cooling medium into the chamber (2), wherein the first nozzle (45) is configured to direct cooling medium directly onto the metal body (1) during deformation, and wherein the second nozzle (46) is configured to direct cooling medium onto the deformation device (5) during deformation. 11. The device according to any one of claims 8-10, wherein said metal body (1) is an elongated body, and wherein said device comprises means (12, 13) for continuous introduction of said metal body (1) into the chamber (2). 12. The device according to claim 11 in combination with claim 10, wherein the means (12, 13) for continuous introduction of said metal body (1) into the chamber (2) is at least one drawing block (12, 13) positioned inside the chamber (2), wherein the first nozzle (45) is configured to direct cooling medium directly onto the metal body (1) being wound onto the drawing block (12, 13), and wherein the second nozzle (46) is configured to direct cooling medium onto an inner wall of the drawing block (12, 13). 13. The device according to claim 11 or 12, wherein said device further comprises a channel (10) through which said elongated metal body (1) is continuously introduced into the chamber (2), and said chamber (2) has an outlet (9) through which cooling medium in a gaseous state is permitted to leave the chamber (2) and be introduced into said channel (10) for the purpose of pre-cooling said metal body (1) before the latter is introduced into the chamber (2). 14. The device according to any one of claims 8-13, wherein said chamber (2) is a generally closed chamber (2), and wherein the device comprises means (8) for controlled evacuation of cooling medium in a gaseous state from said chamber (2). 15. The device according to any one of claims 8-14, wherein said cooling medium source (4) is a liquid nitrogen source (4). 16. The device according to any one of claims 8-15, wherein said metal body (1) is a wire or tube and said deformation device (5) comprises at least one die (14, 15) for reduction of the diameter of the wire or tube.
